message:
feat(codegen): Add isInstalledPackage for generic external module detection

- Add isInstalledPackage() function to import_resolver/resolution.zig
  to detect ANY installed package, not just C extensions
- Replace isCExtension() calls in import_scanner and imports.zig with
  isInstalledPackage() for generic solution handling pytest, numpy, etc.
- Add emitIdent(), emitDottedIdent(), emitImportPath() helpers to
  core.zig that write through builder to maintain output order
- Fix many direct self.output.writer() usages in generator.zig and
  from_imports.zig to use new emit helpers
- Fix escapeZigString() to write through builder instead of directly
  to output

This enables metal0 to handle ANY installed package (not just C extensions)
via the subprocess proxy mechanism. Previously, only packages with .so files
were detected as "external" - now pure Python packages like pytest are also
properly handled.

Note: There are still remaining builder ordering issues in class generation
that cause jumbled output in complex tests - needs further investigation.
